title: The Fight Against Katakuri Begins
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Brûlée, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #8 as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way I'll stand a chance without Haki!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is bad. This is really bad!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a let- down. I can't believe it's already over.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That idiot... why was she sitting there?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This is some random town! We're safe!

dialogue.text: What the-?! the pirate straw hat Luffy?!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 36 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
